title: copier: add GetOptions.IgnoreUnreadable
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add an IgnoreUnreadable flag to copier.GetOptions to suppress errors from copier.Get() that would pass the os.IsPermission() test, if they're encountered while attempting to read files or descend into directories.  This should be useful to API callers like podman.

#### How to verify it

New unit tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
